The '''''Knight Errant''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] that was owned by and saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]]. The vessel was utilized by an Alliance rescue team that had been sent on a mission to rescue the crew of and save the information from the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[Stellar Damsel]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
